headline: UNH Deploys AI in Optum Rx to Tackle Pharmacy Fraud and Cost Leakage
summary: UnitedHealth rolls out AI in Optum Rx to flag pharmacy fraud, billing anomalies and medication risks, aiming to curb cost leakage and improve compliance.

raw.headline: UNH Deploys AI in Optum Rx to Tackle Pharmacy Fraud and Cost Leakage
raw.summary: UnitedHealth rolls out AI in Optum Rx to flag pharmacy fraud, billing anomalies and medication risks, aiming to curb cost leakage and improve compliance.

headline: Healthcare Jobs Drop, UnitedHealth Stock Slips: Opportunity or Risk?
summary: UNH faces rising medical costs, regulatory probes and a healthcare hiring slump while shares keep falling, leaving investors weighing risk or opportunity.
